H7 Network, Carmel, IN
events.description:
H7 Indianapolis IN Business Networking
**Wolfies Grill - Carmel**
*1162 Keystone Way S, Carmel, IN 46032, USA*

H7 Carmel is our weekly networking meeting open to local B2B and B2C professionals. Experience the distinct, structural, difference from other networking groups, associations, and chambers. Our community of meetings are led by Champion Leadership.

***All meetings welcome visitors, we'd love to show you what we're all about!***

\*\*\*Meeting Contact: \*\*\*

**Seth Wilson** *at* ***31

***Meeting Contact*:**

**Andy Corman,** *andy@actrashh

events.title: Indy.rb - The Indianapolis Ruby Brigade Monthly Meetup
events.description:
Indyrb - Indianapolis Ruby Brigade
Join us to talk about Ruby, work projects, hack on something, or just get a drink or bite & enjoy the company.

We are mixing it up again and meeting this month at The Ale Emporium Castleton location
8617 Allisonville Rd
Indianapolis, 46250
https://www.ale-emporium.com/Locations/indianapolis
https://www.google.com/maps/place/Ale+Emporium/@39.9133356,-86.0747701,16z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x886b4d4af5b13331:0xc61bc6f9f216e716!8m2!3d39.9133315!4d-86.0721952!16s%
